$comment: Copilot -> Ollama (local or rig, chosen per device), no cloud keys committed. The __OLLAMA_*__ tokens are substituted by bootstrap from the resolved AI backend. Ollama baseUrl is the bare host with NO /v1; enableCors:true routes via Obsidian's safeFetch (required for http:// hosts, especially on mobile calling the rig over Tailscale). To ALSO keep a switchable second model (e.g. local on the MacBook + a bigger model on the rig), add another entry to activeModels with a DISTINCT 'name' and its own baseUrl, then pick it from Copilot's model dropdown. To use a cloud provider, add its key IN THE APP, never in this repo.
